creator: bhs_bsd@precisionforesight.com
text: I agree. There is no problem. Recreating the jail I was in from scratch allows me to compile py27-six-1.10.0 without problem. At the moment, bug# 207331 (gcc 4.8.5.2 doesn't compile) is preventing me from exactly recreating the situation I had before, but it shouldn't matter. Thanks for your help.
